items.title: Israel hits Lebanese capital in 'targeted strike'
items.summary: Beirut had until now largely been spared even as both Israel and Hezbollah accused each other of breaking last month's ceasefire.

items.title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
items.summary: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

items.title: US Treasury threatens Oman with sanctions over Hormuz Strait
items.summary: US official says Oman should know that Washington 'will aggressively target' actors that facilitate tolls in waterway.

items.title: Talijani razbili mafijašku mrežu, u Zagrebu uhićen hrvatski dobavljač oružja
items.summary: TALIJANSKA policija u Salernu razbila je međunarodnu kriminalnu organizaciju. Izdane su mjere za 23 osobe zbog droge, iznuda i uvoza oružja iz Hrvatske, uz suradnju s USKOK-om.

items.title: Neymar set to miss Brazil World Cup opener due to calf injury
items.summary: Neymar was injured playing for Santos in the Brazil domestic league, and is now confirmed to miss World Cup friendlies.

items.title: NATO naoružava otok u Europi
items.summary: NATO i Švedska užurbano utvrđuju otok koji vide kao ključnu točku obrane Baltika od Rusije. U tijeku su vježbe.

items.title: IOC chief Coventry stirs social media storm over athlete payment comments
items.summary: Olympians slam the IOC chief and Zimbabwe's former medallist for saying athletes should not be paid at the Games.

items.title: Yemen’s former leader Abd-Rabbu Mansour Hadi dies in exile at 80
items.summary: Hadi was the internationally recognised president of Yemen who led a fractured government mostly from exile.

items.title: WSJ objavio navodnu Trumpovu čestitku Epsteinu. Predsjednik SAD-a ih opet tuži
items.summary: DONALD Trump ponovno je podnio tužbu za klevetu od 10 mlrd. dolara protiv Wall Street Journala zbog izvještavanja o njegovim navodnim vezama s Jeffreyjem Epsteinom, nakon što je prva odbačena.

items.title: EU fines Temu €200m for allowing sale of illegal products
items.summary: The European Commission says the Chinese-owned online retailer failed to take account of risks from baby toys and faulty chargers sold on its platform.

items.title: Poisonous invasion: What is the ‘devil’s trumpet’ harming crops in Iraq?
items.summary: The spread of datura is forcing the Iraqi Interior Ministry to urge farmers and citizens to report if spotted.

items.title: Rimski gej prajd zabranio sudjelovanje židovskoj LGBT skupini
items.summary: RIMSKI Pride zabranio je jedinoj židovskoj LGBT skupini u Italiji, Keshet Italia, sudjelovanje na godišnjoj paradi 20. lipnja, uz obrazloženje da nije jasno osudila postupke Izraela u Pojasu Gaze kao genocid. Odluka je izazvala brzu osudu židovskih organizacija.

items.title: Villas, cars and cash: Italy seizes dead Mafia mobster's millions
items.summary: Police say the operation targeted the network of notorious late Sicilian mafia boss Matteo Messina Denaro.

items.title: Oil prices fall after report of breakthrough in US-Iran talks
items.summary: A report of a extended ceasefire, subject to Donald Trump's approval, has led to global oil prices to fall on Thursday.

items.title: US attacks Bandar Abbas again: Why is the port so important for Iran?
items.summary: Bandar Abbas, which the US has targeted multiple times, occupies a strategically sensitive position in Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Are US and Iran close to peace or sliding back to war?
items.summary: Neither side seems interested in a return to all-out conflict, despite the latest exchange of strikes.

items.title: Amerikanci opet napali Iran, oglasio se Hamenei. Axios: SAD i Iran blizu dogovora
items.summary: AMERIČKA vojska izvela je nove napade na Iran, koji je uzvratio gađajući američku bazu.

items.title: Trumpova administracija htjela novčanicu od 250 dolara s njegovim likom
items.summary: DUŽNOSNICI Trumpove administracije vršili su pritisak za izradu novčanice od 250$ s Trumpovim likom, unatoč zakonu koji to brani. Pritisak je doveo do smjene direktorice nadležnog ureda.

items.title: U Italiji uhićena banda migranata. Oteli, drogirali i tri dana silovali turisticu
items.summary: PETORICA migranata u Italiji otela su stranu turisticu te ju puna tri dana držali zatočenom i grupno silovali.

items.title: Sinner shocked in French Open exit as Cerundolo recovers from two-sets down
items.summary: World number one Jannick Sinner beaten by 56th-ranked Argentinian opponent Juan Manuel Cerundolo at Roland Garros.
